Project Support to Prof. Dr. Banu Manav within the Scope of TÜBİTAK 1001

The project titled

“Determination of Visual Comfort Variables in Workspaces Based on Human-Centric Lighting and Energy Performance Requirements”

by Prof. Dr. Banu Manav, Dean of our Faculty of Art and Design, has been awarded support within the scope of the

TÜBİTAK 1001

program.

We congratulate Prof. Manav and wish her success in her research.
